stemHtml: Which of the following scenarios could be described as a latent error?

options.a: Due to rising costs, an airline reduces extra training for its pilots
options.b: An engineer forgets to attach a fuel line after a scheduled maintenance check
options.c: ATC gives you an incorrect climb clearance that causes a TCAS RA
options.d: One of the pilots changes the heading instead of altitude and the aircraft turns away from the correct flight path
